description_long: This umbrella features a wide, circular canopy constructed from dark, metallic panels, each segment separated by visible seams and subtle ridges. The canopy has a slightly domed profile with a central hub at the top, which appears reinforced and possibly houses the opening mechanism. The surface of the canopy is smooth and reflective, with a sleek, almost futuristic appearance, and faint blue highlights along some of the seams. The shaft is straight, slender, and metallic, extending downward from the center of the canopy, with no visible curvature or ergonomic shaping. The tip of the umbrella is capped and blunt, providing a sturdy finish to the shaft. There are no visible decorative elements or patterns on the canopy, giving the umbrella a utilitarian and modern look.
description: A sleek, dark metallic umbrella with a segmented, domed canopy and a straight shaft, featuring a smooth, reflective surface and a blunt tip.
description_view_0: The umbrella is seen from the front, showing the full circular canopy with visible panel seams and a central hub.
description_view_1: This view highlights the right side of the canopy, where the reflective surface and blue highlights are more pronounced.
description_view_2: The left side of the canopy is visible, with the panel divisions and smooth metallic finish clearly shown.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the canopy's segmented structure and the subtle curvature of the panels, with the shaft centered below.
